mapper.sql: id, record_id, class_id, class_name, grade_id, grade_name, org_unit_id, department_name, teacher_id, teacher_name, teacher_phone, class_size, deduction_count, total_score, hygiene_score, discipline_score, attendance_score, dormitory_score, other_score, overall_ranking, grade_ranking, department_ranking, score_level, appeal_count, appeal_approved, appeal_pending, vs_avg_diff, vs_last_diff, trend, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM check_record_class_stats_new WHERE record_id = #{recordId} ORDER BY total_score DESC
SELECT FROM check_record_class_stats_new WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND class_id = #{classId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM check_record_class_stats_new WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND org_unit_id = #{orgUnitId} ORDER BY total_score DESC
SELECT FROM check_record_class_stats_new WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND grade_id = #{gradeId} ORDER BY total_score DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE check_record_class_stats_new cs JOIN ( SELECT id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY total_score ASC) as overall_rank, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY grade_id ORDER BY total_score ASC) as grade_rank, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY org_unit_id ORDER BY total_score ASC) as dept_rank FROM check_record_class_stats_new WHERE record_id = #{recordId} ) r ON cs.id = r.id SET cs.overall_ranking = r.overall_rank, cs.grade_ranking = r.grade_rank, cs.department_ranking = r.dept_rank, cs.updated_at = NOW() WHERE cs.record_id = #{recordId}

UPDATE check_record_class_stats_new cs SET appeal_count = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_record_appeals_new a WHERE a.record_id = cs.record_id AND a.class_id = cs.class_id ), appeal_approved = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_record_appeals_new a WHERE a.record_id = cs.record_id AND a.class_id = cs.class_id AND a.status = 2 ), appeal_pending = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_record_appeals_new a WHERE a.record_id = cs.record_id AND a.class_id = cs.class_id AND a.status IN (0, 1) ), updated_at = NOW() WHERE cs.id = #{classStatId}

UPDATE check_record_class_stats_new cs SET deduction_count = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_record_deductions_new d WHERE d.class_stat_id = cs.id ), total_score = ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(d.actual_score), 0) FROM check_record_deductions_new d WHERE d.class_stat_id = cs.id ), hygiene_score = ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(d.actual_score), 0) FROM check_record_deductions_new d JOIN check_record_category_stats_new cat ON d.category_stat_id = cat.id WHERE d.class_stat_id = cs.id AND cat.category_type = 'HYGIENE' ), discipline_score = ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(d.actual_score), 0) FROM check_record_deductions_new d JOIN check_record_category_stats_new cat ON d.category_stat_id = cat.id WHERE d.class_stat_id = cs.id AND cat.category_type = 'DISCIPLINE' ), attendance_score = ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(d.actual_score), 0) FROM check_record_deductions_new d JOIN check_record_category_stats_new cat ON d.category_stat_id = cat.id WHERE d.class_stat_id = cs.id AND cat.category_type = 'ATTENDANCE' ), dormitory_score = ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(d.actual_score), 0) FROM check_record_deductions_new d JOIN check_record_category_stats_new cat ON d.category_stat_id = cat.id WHERE d.class_stat_id = cs.id AND cat.category_type = 'DORMITORY' ), other_score = ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(d.actual_score), 0) FROM check_record_deductions_new d JOIN check_record_category_stats_new cat ON d.category_stat_id = cat.id WHERE d.class_stat_id = cs.id AND cat.category_type = 'OTHER' ), updated_at = NOW() WHERE cs.id = #{classStatId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO check_record_class_stats_new ( id, record_id, class_id, class_name, grade_id, grade_name, org_unit_id, department_name, teacher_id, teacher_name, teacher_phone, class_size, deduction_count, total_score, hygiene_score, discipline_score, attendance_score, dormitory_score, other_score, overall_ranking, grade_ranking, department_ranking, score_level, appeal_count, appeal_approved, appeal_pending, vs_avg_diff, vs_last_diff, trend, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.recordId}, #{item.classId}, #{item.className}, #{item.gradeId}, #{item.gradeName}, #{item.orgUnitId}, #{item.orgUnitName}, #{item.teacherId}, #{item.teacherName}, #{item.teacherPhone}, #{item.classSize}, #{item.deductionCount}, #{item.totalScore}, #{item.hygieneScore}, #{item.disciplineScore}, #{item.attendanceScore}, #{item.dormitoryScore}, #{item.otherScore}, #{item.overallRanking}, #{item.gradeRanking}, #{item.orgUnitRanking}, #{item.scoreLevel}, #{item.appealCount}, #{item.appealApproved}, #{item.appealPending}, #{item.vsAvgDiff}, #{item.vsLastDiff}, #{item.trend}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT cs. FROM check_record_class_stats_new cs JOIN check_records_new r ON cs.record_id = r.id WHERE cs.class_id = #{classId} AND r.deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.check_date DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
